sql_fixture.redacted_sql: INSERT INTO claims (tenant_id, project_id, research_task_id, claim_text, provenance_json) VALUES (:current_tenant_id, :target_project_id, :target_research_task_id, :claim_text, :redacted_provenance_json)

assertions.name: claims_research_task_composite_fk_blocks_cross_tenant_parent
assertions.expected: The claims research_task composite FK rejects parent tasks outside the inserted tenant/project boundary.

assertions.name: project_id_must_belong_to_tenant
assertions.expected: A target_project_id from another tenant cannot be combined with current_tenant_id for claim insertion.

assertions.name: server_owned_metadata_remains_required
assertions.expected: The negative fixture assumes repository-owned metadata and does not rely on caller-supplied boundary fields.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 BL-0029c full integration。Research/Evidence schema 系の cross-tenant negative skeleton fixture。No production row IDs or personal data.
